currentGoal: Keep the dashboard focused on Luna's identity, one active goal, the most recent completed run, one clear next action, and a few future ideas.
lastCompletedRun: 2026-07-08: Refreshed the Next Action card with a concrete Future Ideas roadmap review.
nextStep: Review Future Ideas against the roadmap and remove any completed or outdated ideas.
dashboardGuide: Status gives a quick snapshot of how the project is doing right now.
Current Goal is the main thing Luna is focused on.
Last Completed Run shows the most recent finished update.
Next Action highlights the single safest action for a beginner to take next.
futureIdeas: Add one small decision log entry explaining why the next action was chosen.

Refresh the Idea Queue after the next completed action.
decisionLog: A dashboard makes Luna easy to understand at a glance.
Structured project data keeps updates small, safe, and beginner-friendly.
Showing goals, ideas, and decisions first creates a clear trail before adding larger features.
The Next Action card helps beginners choose one clear next move without sorting through every project note.
ideaQueue: Add one decision log entry explaining why the next action was chosen.
Review future ideas against the roadmap and remove any completed or outdated idea.
Improve one dashboard label if it would make the page easier for beginners.
ideaQueueGuide: Choose one small task that can be finished clearly in a single update.
Prefer beginner-friendly changes that make Luna easier to understand.
Keep private details out of the public repo.

glossary.meaning: A project folder that keeps files and their change history together.
A safe workspace for trying changes without changing the main version right away.
A request to review and bring a set of changes into the project.
To combine approved changes from one branch into another branch.

localSetup: Open a terminal in the Luna project folder.
Start a simple local web server with python3 -m http.server 8000.
Visit http://localhost:8000 in a browser to view the dashboard.

nextAction.title: Review Future Ideas Against the Roadmap
nextAction.description: Read each Future Ideas item next to the roadmap, then remove any idea that is already done or no longer fits Luna's near-term direction.
nextAction.whyItMatters: A short, current idea list helps beginners pick a useful next task without guessing what still matters.
nextAction.status: Ready for one careful cleanup pass
